label: PRICING
headline: Plans for Every Athlete
description: From casual tracking to professional AI coaching. Start free and upgrade as you grow.
guarantee: All plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee. No credit card required for the free plan.
plan.free.name: Free
plan.free.description: The smartest logbook you've ever used.
plan.supporter.name: Supporter
plan.supporter.description: Automated insights for the self-coached athlete.
plan.supporter.feature_1: Automatic sync for workouts and health metrics
plan.supporter.feature_2: Always-on AI analysis after new activities
plan.supporter.feature_4: Reliable trend tracking and weekly summaries
plan.pro.name: Pro
plan.pro.description: Your full-service Digital Twin and Coach.
plan.pro.feature_1: Adaptive race strategy and periodized planning
plan.pro.feature_2: Thoughtful AI coaching with scenario analysis
plan.pro.feature_3: Proactive alerts for readiness and overreaching risk
plan.pro.feature_4: Advanced trend intelligence with long-horizon forecasting
cancel_anytime: Cancel anytime. Instant downgrade to Free.
modal.title: Confirm Downgrade
modal.description: Review changes to your subscription plan
modal.warning: You are moving to a lower tier. Some features (like Deep AI Analysis) will be restricted once the change is processed.
modal.stripe_note: Stripe will automatically calculate any credits for your unused time and apply them to your future bills.
